arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Glue Catalog Table.

catalog_id.description: The ID of the Glue Catalog in which the table resides.

description.description: A user-defined description of the Glue Catalog Table.

id.description: The ID of the Glue Catalog Table.

owner.description: The owner of the Glue Catalog Table.

parameters.description: A set of key-value pairs that define parameters for the table.

partition_index.description: A list of partition indexes associated with the table.

partition_keys.description: A list of partition keys for the table with details.

retention.description: The retention period for the table in days.

storage_descriptor.description: Details the storage information of the table including columns, formats, and locations.

table_type.description: The type of the table (e.g., EXTERNAL_TABLE, VIRTUAL_VIEW).

target_table.description: Details of the target table including catalog ID, database name, and region.

view_expanded_text.description: The expanded text of the view if the table is a view.

view_original_text.description: The original text of the view if the table is a view.
